Acceptance of this Privacy Policy

Please read this Privacy Policy before you proceed to use the App. This Privacy Policy informs you: what information we and the third-party services we use collect from you; and how we and these third-party services use and share your information. We do not use or share your personal information with anyone except as described hereunder. By installing the App and making use of our services, you give us your full consent to the collection and use of your Information as outlined hereunder. If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at

heading_content_part: Personal data we collect and useArticle 4 of the General Data Protection Regulation defines "Personal data" as"Any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person; an identifiable natural person is one who can be identified, directly or indirectly, in particular by reference to an identifier such as a name, an identification number, location data, an online identifier or to one or more factors specific to the physical, physiological, genetic, mental, economic, cultural or social identity of that natural person"

heading_content_part: Personal data you provide us voluntarilyWe do not require Users to submit any personal data as a prerequisite to using the App, however, you may voluntarily provide us with your personal data when you send us inquiries, or when you send us any support requests.Personal data you provide us voluntarily includes your:Your Name;Your E-mail Address; andContent of your message

decoder_heading: Personal data you provide us voluntarily
ident_heading: Personal data you provide us voluntarily
heading_content_part: We process this personal data to respond to your inquiry or support requests and to keep a record of our past communication with you. The legal basis of our processing is our legitimate interest as we are unable to perform our obligations towards you without processing your personal data and such use does not override your personal data rights.

decoder_heading: Personal data you provide us voluntarily
ident_heading: Personal data you provide us voluntarily
heading_content_part: We do not retain this personal data on our database for longer than two years from the date of our last communication with you, unless we are required to retain this personal data for defending any claims or actions involving you.
Information we receive from third-parties

Firebase Performance MonitoringWe use Firebase Performance Monitoring provided by Google to enable our users to use our App in a seamless manner and to prevent/address any service errors or technical issues. To learn more please visitPrivacy and Security in FirebaseandGoogleâ€™s Privacy Policy.

Google Analytics for FirebaseWe also use Google Analytics for Firebase. Google Analytics uses the data to provide analytics and attribution information. The type of information collected through the Google Analytics for direbase includes:Number of users and sessions,Session durationOperating systemsDevice modelsGeographyFirst launchesApp opensApp updates

Google Analytics retains Instance ID-associated data for 60 days, and retains aggregate reporting and campaign data in accordance with the retention preferences set by us. To learn more about Googleâ€™s use of data please visitGoogleâ€™s Partner Policy,Privacy and Security in Firebaseas well asGoogleâ€™s Privacy Policy.Opt-out of Google Analytics for Firebase
You can disable collection of your information by Google Analytics for Firebase by selecting the miscellaneous option in the App Settings and unchecking the Google Analytics for Firebase option.
Firebase Crashlytics

When you use our App, it may automatically collect certain information from users who access or use our App. This data includes, but is not limited to, device state information, unique device identifiers, device hardware and operating system information, information relating to how our app functions, and the physical location of a device at the time of a crash. Please note that Firebase Crashlytics may use aggregate and anonymised data to improve their service. To learn more about Firebase Crashlytics privacy policy please visit

Privacy and Security in Firebase.Opt-out of Firebase CrashlyticsYou can disable collection of your information by Crashlytics by selecting the miscellaneous option in the App Settings and unchecking the Crashlytics data collection.

heading_content_part: Privacy-relevant Android permissions requested by this appLocation DataOur App may request Users to provide us with their location data. We use this location data to provide features of our App. You have the choice to refuse collection of location data when requested. Please note that when you disallow our access to your location data, it may restrict your ability to use certain features and functionality of the App.

decoder_heading: Privacy-relevant Android permissions requested by this app
ident_heading: Privacy-relevant Android permissions requested by this app
heading_content_part: Our legal basis for processing this data is your consent which may be withheld or withdrawn by you at anytime.StorageUsed for runtime permissions related to the shared external storage. This permission allows this application opening gpx, gpz, kml and loc files. It also allows Users to save app screenshots on their device as well as compressing gpx and kml files.Our legal basis for processing this data is performance of contract with you.5.

Sharing your personal dataWe do not sell or rent your personal information to any third-party. We may disclose your personal information in the following circumstances:For our compliance with applicable laws and upon reasonable requests from government bodies or regulatory authorities;To our employees to enable them to perform their duties during the course of their employment;To our third-party processors such as Google who process this data on our behalf to provide their services to us.

In the future, if we undergo a merger or acquisition, your personal data that we hold may be transferred to the new business entity as a result of such transaction. Please note any such transfer of your personal data to the new entity will not change how your personal data is collected, used, and secured or any data rights that you have under this Privacy Policy;We may disclose your personal data to:Prevent or investigate possible wrongdoing in connection with the App;
Protect the personal safety of users of the App or the public; and/orProtect against legal liability.6.

heading_content_part: Although the Company is located in Estonia, we make use of third-party applications and services that have servers located outside of the Eurpoean Economic Area (EEA) including United States of America where the data protection laws are significantly different from those within the EEA. When you use our App your information may be transferred outside the EEA for the purposes of processing as set out in this Privacy Policy. Please note that despite such transfer of data outside of the EEA, your personal information will always be handled in accordance with this Privacy Policy and you will retain all rights outlined in this Privacy Policy.

heading_content_part: Your Data Rights

decoder_heading: Your right to access your personal information
ident_heading: Your right to access your personal information
heading_content_part: Your right to access your personal informationYou have the right to access your personal data that we collect and process. This right is only available to the extent that your access does not negatively affect the rights of other individuals and is not excessive or manifestly unfounded. Please note, we may be required to verify your identity before we provide you with any personal data.

decoder_heading: Your right to edit your personal information
ident_heading: Your right to edit your personal information
heading_content_part: Your right to edit your personal informationWhere your personal data that we hold is incorrect, outdated or inaccurate, you have the right to rectify such inaccuracies and update your data. Please note, we may be required to verify your identity before providing any access to personal data to you. This is to ensure that your personal information is not accessed by any unauthorized person resulting in a security breach. We will respond to rectification requests within one month provided the request is not excessive or manifestly unfounded.

decoder_heading: Your right to erasure of your personal information
ident_heading: Your right to erasure of your personal information
heading_content_part: Your right to erasure of your personal informationYou have the right to request erasure of your personal information from our records under the following circumstances:Your personal information is no longer required for the purpose for which it was initially collected;You withdraw your consent that you previously granted;Where you object to the processing of your data and there is no overriding legitimate interest to continue processing;

decoder_heading: Your right to erasure of your personal information
ident_heading: Your right to erasure of your personal information
heading_content_part: Where your personal data is unlawfully processed (originally in breach of the GDPR);Where your personal data is used for direct marketing purposes.If you wish to exercise your right to access, edit or erase your personal information, please contact us atand we will respond to your request within thirty days.

decoder_heading: Your right to restrict processing of your personal data
ident_heading: Your right to restrict processing of your personal data
heading_content_part: Your right to restrict processing of your personal dataYou may under certain circumstances request us to restrict processing your personal data including where:You dispute the accuracy of your personal information that we hold;The processing of your personal information is unlawful but you are not authorizing us to erase it;

Security of your dataWe endeavour to keep all your personal data secure and we use all reasonable and commercially viable methods and techniques to protect your data. However, as with most online storage and transmission of data, there may be vulnerabilities that we are not aware of therefore we are unable to offer any guarantees as to the security of your data. As you are not required to provide any personal information to use the App, the risk is limited.9.

Third-party website linksOur App may contain links to third party websites that are neither owned nor operated by us. Should you decide to click on any such third party links, you will be directed to such third party website. These third-party sites have their own Terms of Service and Privacy Policy and we encourage you to review their Terms and Privacy Policy prior to using their site or any services offered by them.

We disclaim all liability with regards to your use and access of such third-party sites. We cannot be held responsible for any content made available by these third-party sites or their practices. Your access and use of these sites solely at your own risk.10.

Protection of Childrenâ€™s PrivacyOur App is not aimed at persons who are under the age of eighteen (18) years ("Children"). If you are the parent / legal guardian of a Child who you believe has provided us with his/her personally identifiable information, please

contact us with the relevant information and we will investigate the matter and take appropriate action. We do not knowingly collect any personal information from children.11.
